name: @search
description: Code search and symbol lookup. Includes grep, egrep, find, locate commands, pattern matching, and O(1) instant indexing. Result ranking and tokenization for fast retrieval.

name: @indexing
description: Index management and symbol indexing. Scans codebase for symbols, builds inverted indexes, manages index states, and handles index updates. Redis integration for fast lookups.

name: @api
description: REST API endpoints and HTTP handlers. Request routing, response formatting, status codes, and middleware processing. Gateway integration and endpoint definitions.

name: @gateway
description: Gateway and request forwarding. Proxies HTTP requests to backend services, handles routing logic, manages service communication, and request/response transformation.

name: @intent
description: Intent tracking and usage analytics. Captures user actions, analyzes search patterns, tracks domain usage, and generates predictions. Session-based intent recording.

name: @domains
description: Semantic domain management and learning. Domain generation, enrichment with terms and keywords, domain rebalancing, and project-specific domain customization.

name: @hooks
description: Claude Code hooks and event capturing. Hook installation, trigger conditions, status line generation, and real-time feedback integration with the IDE.

name: @redis
description: Redis data storage and caching. Connection management, key-value operations, domain caching, session storage, and distributed state management.

name: @jobs
description: Background job processing and queue management. Job queuing, worker processing, enrichment task scheduling, and async execution of domain enrichment.

name: @cli
description: Command-line interface and shell commands. aOa CLI commands, argument parsing, subcommand routing, and user-facing shell interface implementation.

name: @config
description: Configuration management and settings. Project configuration, environment variables, settings templates, and runtime configuration loading and validation.

name: @docker
description: Docker containerization and deployment. Dockerfile, docker-compose configuration, container orchestration, and multi-service deployment setup.

name: @setup
description: Project initialization and onboarding. First-run setup, domain generation, user guidance, and configuration initialization for new projects.

name: @ranking
description: Search result ranking and relevance scoring. Scoring algorithms, relevance computation, term weighting, and result ordering based on multiple factors.

name: @learner
description: Machine learning and domain enrichment. Term extraction, keyword identification, semantic tagging, and intelligent domain rebalancing logic.

name: @session
description: Session management and state tracking. Session storage, user session handling, session parsing, and session-based analytics collection.

name: @git
description: Git integration and version control. Repository operations, git proxies, branch tracking, and version control system interaction.

name: @health
description: System health monitoring and status checking. Service status verification, health endpoints, dependency checks, and diagnostic information.

name: @testing
description: Test suites and quality assurance. Unit tests, end-to-end tests, test frameworks, simulation scripts, and validation routines.

name: @benchmarks
description: Performance benchmarking and metrics. Speed measurements, throughput metrics, latency analysis, and comparative performance evaluation.

name: @files
description: File discovery and location. File searching by patterns, path resolution, file listing, and efficient file system traversal.

name: @analytics
description: Data analytics and metrics collection. Performance statistics, usage analytics, event logging, and statistical analysis of system behavior.

name: @proxy
description: HTTP proxying and request interception. Proxy servers, request forwarding, service routing, and transparent protocol bridging.

name: @compression
description: Semantic compression and file outlines. Code summarization, structural analysis, and compressed representations of large files for efficient viewing.

name: @utils
description: Utility functions and helpers. Common utilities, shell utilities, error handling, and reusable code components across services.
